title: swertia cuneata var. cuneata
intro: Swertia cuneata var. cuneata, also known as the Yellowroot or Golden Root, is a perennial plant species within the Swertia genus, native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant compounds. The health benefits of Swertia cuneata var. cuneata include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be done under the guidance of a medical professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
